candidate.name: Prayoga Rasyid Sudrajat
candidate.professional_summary: Physics graduate from Universitas Padjadjaran with a strong analytical foundation and hands-on experience in manufacturing data engineering and analysis. Proficient in Python, SQL, Tableau, and ETL processes, currently upskilling via Hacktiv8 Data Science Bootcamp.

top_jobs.reason: Strong alignment with the required stack (SQL, Python, Tableau) and emphasis on ETL processes which matches the candidate's internship experience.
Candidate meets all technical requirements, specifically data visualization (Tableau) and analytical reporting capabilities.
Directly matches the candidate's previous experience in the manufacturing sector and interest in applied machine learning.

recommendations.title: Learn Power BI
recommendations.description: While you are proficient in Tableau and Looker, many roles in Indonesia specifically request Power BI for internal reporting.

recommendations.title: Expand Business Use Cases
recommendations.description: Highlight the business impact of your projects (e.g., cost savings or time efficiency percentages) more explicitly to align with Senior Data Analyst expectations.

recommendations.title: Cloud Data Warehousing
recommendations.description: Add a certification in Google BigQuery or AWS Redshift to stand out for mid-to-senior level roles.
